REDMIST-TEMPORARY_SPEED_POWER.descriptio: #Gain *Speed until the end of this turn.
REDMIST-TEMPORARY_SPEED_POWER.smartDescr: #Gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] *Speed until the end of this turn.
REDMIST-TEMPORARY_SPEED_DOWN.description: #Lose *Speed until the end of this turn.
REDMIST-TEMPORARY_SPEED_DOWN.smartDescri: #Lose [blue]{Amount}[/blue] *Speed until the end of this turn.
REDMIST-STRENGTH_NEXT_TURN_POWER.title: Strength Next Turn
REDMIST-STRENGTH_NEXT_TURN_POWER.descrip: At the start of your next turn, gain Strength.
REDMIST-STRENGTH_NEXT_TURN_POWER.smartDe: At the start of your next turn, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] Strength.
At the end of your turn, lose Strength.
At the end of your turn, lose [blue]{Amount}[/blue] Strength.
REDMIST-BLEED_POWER.title: Bleed
REDMIST-PARTIAL_EGO_POWER.title: Partial EGO
REDMIST-PARTIAL_EGO_POWER.description: Gain *Strength and *Dexterity. Whenever an Attack kills an enemy, gain *Strength and *Dexterity. At the start of your turn, if you dealt less than [blue]10[/blue] unblocked damage last turn, lose this Power and all stats granted by it.
REDMIST-PARTIAL_EGO_POWER.smartDescripti: Gain [blue]2[/blue] *Strength and [blue]2[/blue] *Dexterity. Whenever an Attack kills an enemy, gain [blue]1[/blue] *Strength and [blue]1[/blue] *Dexterity. At the start of your turn, if you dealt less than [blue]10[/blue] unblocked damage last turn, lose this Power and all stats granted by it.
REDMIST-SPEED_POWER.title: Speed
REDMIST-SPEED_POWER.description: Whenever you play an Agile card, repeat its effect [blue]{Amount}[/blue] extra times.
REDMIST-SPEED_POWER.smartDescription: Whenever you play an Agile card, repeat its effect [blue]{Amount}[/blue] extra times.
REDMIST-INSTINCTS_POWER.title: Instincts
REDMIST-INSTINCTS_POWER.description: Heal HP every time you cause damage
REDMIST-INSTINCTS_POWER.smartDescription: Heal [blue]{Amount}[/blue] HP every time you cause damage
REDMIST-VENGEANCE_POWER.title: Vengeance
REDMIST-VENGEANCE_POWER.description: Gain *Strength based on the amount of damage taken the previous turn
REDMIST-VENGEANCE_POWER.smartDescription: Gain [blue]1[/blue]*Strength for each [blue]3[/blue] damage taken the previous turn, up to {Amount}
